overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a leather jacket walking through an urban environment. The character travels along a brick sidewalk past a parking garage, crosses a street at a crosswalk, and enters a bright modern campus plaza with a science center building. The scene features clear midday lighting and transitions from a commercial street to an open institutional plaza.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along brick sidewalk following a woman in a red coat, passing flower planters and street trees

notable_agents.action: woman in red coat walking ahead of ego along the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story concrete parking structure with open levels and horizontal lines
concrete planters with pink flowering bushes lining the sidewalk
commercial building with brick facade and large windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a brick-paved city sidewalk with a multi-story parking garage on the left and commercial buildings with flower planters on the right. The scene is set in bright midday sun with sparse pedestrian traffic. A woman in a red coat walks ahead of the character, maintaining a steady pace along the urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with telephone booth and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: ego steps onto striped crosswalk to cross the street toward the plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching intersection and crossing the street alongside other pedestrians, passing a telephone booth

notable_agents.action: man in suit exiting telephone booth and walking away
two women in light-colored dresses waiting at the crosswalk and then crossing

entered.detail: glass and metal public telephone enclosure on the sidewalk
red octagonal stop sign mounted on a pole at the intersection
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a street corner featuring a telephone booth and stop sign. After passing the booth, the character steps onto a striped crosswalk to cross the street. Other pedestrians including two women in dresses and a man exiting the telephone booth are present at the intersection. The parking garage recedes into the background as the character crosses toward an open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern campus plaza with science center and landscaped garden

events.description: entering bright open plaza area with modern science center building visible ahead
ground surface becomes bright white and highly reflective in the open plaza sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through landscaped plaza toward the science center building, passing benches and greenery

entered.detail: large modern concrete and glass institutional building with signage reading DUVALL HALL SCIENCE CENTER
green metal park benches situated along the landscaped path
landscaped greenery with bushes, young trees, and flowering plants in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bright, open campus plaza with a large modern science center building dominating the background. The environment transitions from urban street to institutional green space with landscaped gardens, park benches, and paved walkways. The ground surface appears highly reflective in the intense midday sun. The character continues walking through the plaza, passing by greenery and approaching the science center building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a commercial city corridor that gradually opens into a bright, modern institutional plaza. It begins by following a character along a brick-paved sidewalk between a multi-story parking garage and commercial buildings adorned with flower planters. As the character reaches a street corner, the camera passes a telephone booth and a stop sign before transitioning across a striped crosswalk where other pedestrians gather. The urban street then gives way to an expansive campus plaza, shifting the environment from dense city architecture to landscaped gardens and reflective paved walkways. Finally, the scene expands toward a large, modern science center building that dominates the background under the intense midday sun.
